title: ABVMU UP Common Nursing Entrance Test UPCNET Admit Card 2026
organization: ABVMU UP Common Nursing Entrance Test
short_info: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University (ABVMU), Uttar Pradesh has released the UP Common Nursing Entrance Test UPCNET Notification 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 28/03/2026 to 20/05/2026.candidates should read the UPCNET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the UPCNET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, B.SC Nursing, Post B.SC Nursing and M.Sc Nursing Courses, information and other types of information and then apply. application_fee: General / OBC / EWS: 3000/- SC / ST / PH : 2000/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking Only. UP Common Nursing Admission Test 2026 :

rows: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University ABVMU UP Common Nursing Entrance Test CNET 2026 Admit Card

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University (ABVMU), Uttar Pradesh has released the UP Common Nursing Entrance Test UPCNET Notification 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 28/03/2026 to 20/05/2026.candidates should read the UPCNET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the UPCNET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, B.SC Nursing, Post B.SC Nursing and M.Sc Nursing Courses, information and other types of information and then apply.

tables.table_name: UP Common Nursing Admission Test 2026 : Age Limit as on 31/12/2026 Minimum Age : 17 Years. Age Relaxation Details Read the UP Common Nursing CNET 2026 Rules.
rows: 10+2 Intermediate with PCB Subject and Passed in English Individually from Any Recognized Board. Minimum 45% Marks.
10+2 Intermediate Exam from Any Recognized Board in India. GNM Certificate and Registered as State Nurses Registration Council. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification
M.SC Nursing / Nurse Practitioner in Critical Care NPCC 2 Years

Registered Nurse and Registered Midwife with Any Nursing Registration Council. B.SC Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc Nursing with 55% Marks. 1 Year Work Experience Clinical OR Teaching After Basic B.SC Nursing More Eligibility Details Read the Notification
